arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest predicted XI v Fulham: Nuno Espirito Santo to hand £11m player starting Premier League debut
Nottingham Forest vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have their unbeaten record in the Premier League to defend when they take on Fulham at the City Ground this weekend. Fulham are right on their tail, however, and Marco Silva's side enter Saturday's trip to Nottingham off the back of a hugely impressive 3-1 home win against Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Raul Jimenez looking to match Javier Hernandez feat in Fulham's clash with Forest
arts.sum: Fulham forward Raul Jimenez will look to follow in the footsteps of his compatriot Javier Hernandez when he features against Nottingham Forest on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday six this weekend and Tom McGarry has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Fulham predictions: Rivals look tough to split
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have made a surprise unbeaten start in the Premier League and Ian Wilkerson says the Tricky Trees can stay that way after they host Fulham.

arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will be bidding to remain as the only side to possess a certain Premier League streak when they host Fulham on Saturday afternoon.

arts.sum: Fulham manager Marco Silva admits he is content with the fact that Nottingham Forest will be without Morgan Gibbs-White for Saturday's Premier League clash.
